member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateTenantInput
member.summary: Input for creating a tenant (client/organization).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateTenantInput.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Input for creating a tenant (client/organization).

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput
member.summary: Input for creating a customer/outlet (bar/restaurant/shop).
member.param: Optional point-of-contact email for the outlet.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Input for creating a customer/outlet (bar/restaurant/shop).
member.param: Optional point-of-contact email for the outlet.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput.Name
member.summary: Customer name (e.g. "Blue Fox Bar").

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput.ContactEmail
member.summary: Optional point-of-contact email for the outlet.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput.ExternalId
member.summary: Optional ERP/CRM customer ID.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput
member.summary: Input for creating a user/employee under a customer/outlet.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Input for creating a user/employee under a customer/outlet.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput.CustomerId
member.summary: Customer/outlet identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput.Email
member.summary: User email (login identifier).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput.Role
member.summary: Optional role string (e.g., Owner/Employee/Admin).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput.ExternalId
member.summary: Optional upstream user ID.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput
member.summary: Input for redeeming points for a reward/loyalty product. This is a frontend-driven operation (GraphQL).
member.param: Positive amount to redeem; stored as negative ledger entry.
Optional idempotency key (e.g. redemption order id).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Input for redeeming points for a reward/loyalty product. This is a frontend-driven operation (GraphQL).
member.param: Positive amount to redeem; stored as negative ledger entry.
Optional idempotency key (e.g. redemption order id).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput.CustomerId
member.summary: Customer/outlet whose balance is debited.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput.ActorUserId
member.summary: User who initiated the redemption.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput.Amount
member.summary: Positive amount to redeem; stored as negative ledger entry.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput.Reason
member.summary: Reason label (e.g. "reward_redeem").

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput.CorrelationId
member.summary: Optional idempotency key (e.g. redemption order id).

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Mutation
member.summary: GraphQL mutations for frontend/admin operations (NOT ERP ingestion).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Mutation.CreateTenant(Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateTenantInput,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.ITenantService)
member.summary: Creates a tenant record.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Mutation.CreateCustomer(Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateCustomerInput,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService)
member.summary: Creates a customer/outlet and its points account (balance=0).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Mutation.CreateUser(Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.CreateUserInput,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserService)
member.summary: Creates a user/employee under a customer/outlet.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Mutation.RedeemPoints(Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.RedeemPointsInput,Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.ILedgerService)
member.summary: Redeems points for a customer/outlet. Creates an immutable ledger entry and updates cached balance.
member.remarks: Ledger immutability is enforced in DB via trigger (UPDATE/DELETE blocked). Corrections must be compensating inserts.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Query
member.summary: GraphQL read operations for the frontend/admin UI.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Query.Customer(System.Guid,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService)
member.summary: Returns a single customer/outlet with its cached points account balance.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Query.CustomersByTenant(System.Guid,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService)
member.summary: Lists customers for a given tenant. Useful for admin UI screens.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Query.UsersByCustomer(System.Guid,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserService)
member.summary: Lists users (employees) for a customer/outlet.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Query.CustomerTransactions(System.Guid,Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.ILedgerService)
member.summary: Returns last N ledger entries for a customer/outlet (immutable points history).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.GraphQL.Query.Tenants(Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.ITenantService)
member.summary: Lists tenants (admin convenience; can be removed once auth/tenant scoping is implemented).

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext
member.summary: EF Core context for the Loyalty MVP.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext})
member.summary: Configured EF Core context for the modular monolith.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.Tenants
member.summary: Tenant module aggregate root set.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.Customers
member.summary: Customer module aggregate root set.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.Users
member.summary: Customer module users/employees set.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.PointsAccounts
member.summary: Ledger module cached balances.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.PointsTransactions
member.summary: Ledger module immutable transactions.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Configure entity mappings and module boundaries.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContextFactory
member.summary: Provides EF Core with a reliable way to construct the DbContext at design-time (migrations, database update) without depending on the web host startup.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContextFactory.CreateDbContext(System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a design-time DbContext for migrations and tooling.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerLookup
member.summary: Read-only contract for customer lookups (cross-module safe).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerLookup.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve a customer by id.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerLookup.BelongsToTenantAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if a customer belongs to the specified tenant.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserLookup
member.summary: Read-only contract for user lookups (cross-module safe).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserLookup.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve a user by id.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CreateCustomerCommand
member.summary: Command for creating a customer/outlet.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CreateCustomerCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command for creating a customer/outlet.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService
member.summary: Customer module application contract.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService.GetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch a single customer with cached balance.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService.ListByTenantAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List customers for a tenant.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.ICustomerService.CreateAsync(Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CreateCustomerCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a customer and seed its points account.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CustomerService
member.summary: Customer module application service (profile + cached balance wiring).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CustomerService.#ctor(Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext)
member.summary: Constructs the service with the shared DbContext.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CreateUserCommand
member.summary: Command for creating a user under a customer.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CreateUserCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command for creating a user under a customer.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserService
member.summary: User application contract within the Customers module.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserService.ListByCustomerAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List users belonging to a customer.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserService.CreateAsync(Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.CreateUserCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a user under a customer/tenant.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.UserService
member.summary: Users application service (employees/actors) inside the Customers module.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.UserService.#ctor(Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext)
member.summary: Constructs the user service.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer
member.summary: A business customer/outlet (bar/restaurant/shop) participating in the loyalty program. Points balance and ledger are maintained at this level.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.Id
member.summary: Primary identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant that owns this customer record.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.Tenant
member.summary: Owning tenant navigation.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.Name
member.summary: Display name (e.g. "Blue Fox Bar").

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.ContactEmail
member.summary: Customer-level point of contact email (not necessarily a login). Useful for operational communication and data matching.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.ExternalId
member.summary: External identifier from upstream systems (ERP/CRM/customer master). Strongly recommended for matching inbound ERP documents.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.CreatedAt
member.summary: Creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.Users
member.summary: Users (employees) that can act on behalf of this Customer.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.PointsAccount
member.summary: Cached balance (fast reads). Source of truth remains the ledger.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.Customer.Transactions
member.summary: Immutable ledger of points movements for this Customer.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User
member.summary: A human user/employee who can place orders and redeem rewards on behalf of a Customer.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.Id
member.summary: Primary identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant boundary (prevents cross-tenant mixing).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.Tenant
member.summary: Owning tenant navigation.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.CustomerId
member.summary: The Customer/outlet this user belongs to.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.Customer
member.summary: Customer navigation.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.Email
member.summary: User email (typically used as login identifier).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.ExternalId
member.summary: Optional upstream identifier (ERP/IdP/HR).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.Role
member.summary: Optional role (e.g., "Owner", "Employee", "Admin"). MVP can keep as free text.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.CreatedAt
member.summary: Creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Domain.User.InitiatedTransactions
member.summary: Ledger entries this user initiated (optional attribution).

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.RedeemPointsCommand
member.summary: Command for redeeming points on a customer account.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.RedeemPointsCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command for redeeming points on a customer account.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.ILedgerService
member.summary: Ledger application contract.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.ILedgerService.GetTransactionsForCustomerAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch recent transactions for a customer.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.ILedgerService.RedeemAsync(Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.RedeemPointsCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Redeem points and update cached balance.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.LedgerService
member.summary: Ledger module application service (immutable transactions + cached balance).

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Application.LedgerService.#ctor(Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext,Loyalty.Api.Modules.Customers.Application.IUserLookup)
member.summary: Constructs the ledger service.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsAccount
member.summary: Cached balance for fast reads. The immutable ledger is PointsTransaction.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsAccount.Id
member.summary: Primary identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsAccount.CustomerId
member.summary: Customer that owns this points account (one-to-one).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsAccount.Customer
member.summary: Customer navigation.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsAccount.Balance
member.summary: Cached balance (derived from ledger in principle).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsAccount.UpdatedAt
member.summary: When the cached balance was last updated.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction
member.summary: Append-only ledger entry representing a points movement for a Customer. This table must be immutable: do NOT update/delete rows. Use compensating transactions instead.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier of the ledger entry.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.CustomerId
member.summary: The Customer/outlet whose balance is affected.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.Customer
member.summary: Customer navigation.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.ActorUserId
member.summary: Optional actor user who initiated the action (UI redemption, manual adjustment, etc.). ERP-driven points may not always provide user identity, so this can be null.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.ActorUser
member.summary: Optional actor navigation.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.Amount
member.summary: Signed delta. Positive = earn/credit. Negative = redeem/debit.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.Reason
member.summary: Human-readable reason (e.g. "invoice_points", "reward_redeem", "manual_adjustment").

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.CorrelationId
member.summary: Optional idempotency/correlation key (e.g. ERP invoice id, redemption id, message id).

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.LoyaltyLedger.Domain.PointsTransaction.CreatedAt
member.summary: Creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.ITenantService
member.summary: Tenant module application contract.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.ITenantService.CreateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a tenant.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.ITenantService.ExistsAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if a tenant exists.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.ITenantService.ListAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List tenants for administration.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.TenantService
member.summary: Tenant module application service. Keeps creation and queries in one place for easy extraction later.

member.name: M:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Application.TenantService.#ctor(Loyalty.Api.Infrastructure.Persistence.LoyaltyDbContext)
member.summary: Constructs the tenant service.

member.name: T:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Domain.Tenant
member.summary: Tenant boundary. Even if MVP runs single-tenant, this keeps the model future-proof and safer.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Domain.Tenant.Id
member.summary: Primary identifier.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Domain.Tenant.Name
member.summary: Tenant display name.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Domain.Tenant.CreatedAt
member.summary: Creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Domain.Tenant.Customers
member.summary: Customers/outlets belonging to this tenant.

member.name: P:Loyalty.Api.Modules.Tenants.Domain.Tenant.Users
member.summary: All users under this tenant (convenience navigation).
